description_long: This is a classic wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark mahogany finish and a smooth, polished surface. The front features three spacious drawers, each equipped with two small, round, dark metal knob handles. The chest stands on four elegantly curved legs, giving it a traditional and slightly ornate appearance. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood grain texture and finish as the front. There are no visible locks or branding, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy, solid wood build typical of high-quality furniture.
description: A dark mahogany wooden chest of drawers with three drawers, round metal knobs, and curved legs. The finish is smooth and polished, with a classic, traditional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with round metal knobs and curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, polished wood panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with the same finish as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood panel and curved leg.
